what_is_working: warm replies and concrete founder pain scenes

experiments.hypothesis: A proof-first hook with a real revenue number will outperform a generic AI capability hook.
experiments.variant_b: Proof-first post with one revenue number and one concrete operator scene

experiments.hypothesis: A specific buyer outcome CTA will convert better than abstract AI philosophy framing.
experiments.variant_b: Specific outcome-led CTA tied to a founder pain point
experiments.metric: clicks or replies that express buying intent

experiments.hypothesis: Following up on warm leads within 24h will outperform waiting 48h+.
experiments.variant_b: Follow up within 24h with a context-specific note
